content_body: We just spent a long weekend celebrating my parent's 50th wedding anniversary. Two children + daughters-in-law and four grandchildren present (and, of course, Mom and Dad). Despite the cloudy and rainy days, we had a wonderful time. The house, grounds, and Blue Ridge area made the occasion even better. We are very thankful that you have opened your home to provide a place to enjoy meaningful events! Cheers, the Emde Family
title: A Wonderful Place To Enjoy Meaningful Events!
